name: Checkbox
description: A widget that allows users to toggle between checked and unchecked states (dual-state), or checked, unchecked, and partially checked states (tri-state).

keyboard_interactions.action: Toggles the checkbox state between checked, unchecked, and (if tri-state) partially checked

roles.description: Identifies the element as a checkbox

required_attributes.description: true when checked; false when unchecked; 'mixed' when partially checked (tri-state)
Provided via visible text content, aria-labelledby, or aria-label

optional_attributes.description: References the visible label for the group

notes: Prefer native <input type='checkbox'> over ARIA checkbox
For tri-state checkboxes controlling a group, use aria-checked='mixed' when some but not all children are checked
